graphdl.description: GraphDL AREST engine — FORML2 readings → REST API. Exposes create/apply/compile/audit tools for domain modeling, constraint validation, and self-modification.

graphdl-tutor.description: GraphDL with the full graphdl-tutor domain bundle loaded (catalog, orders, tasks, content, scheduling, notifications). Use this to exercise every framework feature from Claude.

graphdl-remote.description: GraphDL AREST engine (remote worker mode). Requires GRAPHDL_URL and GRAPHDL_API_KEY set in your shell.
